romain      2012-07-02 12:46:08 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/pinta       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    graphics/pinta/files patch-Pinta.Install.proj 
  Log:
  Pinta is a drawing/editing program modeled after Paint.NET. Its goal is to
  provide a simplified alternative to GIMP for casual users.
  
  WWW: http://pinta-project.com/
  
  PR:             ports/164309
  Submitted by:   Alexander Kojevnikov <alexander@kojevnikov.com>
